name: PitchBook
one_liner: Private capital market intelligence platform (companies, deals, investors, funds, LPs) with a RESTful Direct Data API for pulling PitchBook data on demand.
access_notes: The PitchBook API is a standalone offering requiring a separate contract agreement on top of a PitchBook license. A test 'sandbox' environment exists, but you must contact your PitchBook account manager to request a sandbox key -- there is no self-serve signup or public credential issuance. Existing enterprise clients can test endpoints via the Plugins & Apps section in My PitchBook.
api_notes: Public API V2 is a RESTful, JSON, system-agnostic API providing direct real-time access to companies, deals, people, investors, funds, service providers, and limited partners. Covers several core entities with lookup/search endpoints; roughly moderate breadth. Postman documentation (Public API V2) is published but the underlying data requires a contracted key.
mcp_notes: PitchBook ships official vendor MCP integrations: the 'PitchBook Premium Connector' (built on MCP server technology, cloud-hosted, SSO auth) and a 'PitchBook Essential MCP' integration announced with Perplexity. Works with Anthropic's Claude for Financial Services, OpenAI ChatGPT, and Perplexity. Access limited to licensed PitchBook users (seat-based/unlimited/trial plus enterprise partner license); auth via SSO tied to user permissions.
main_blocker: API access requires a separate paid contract and an account-manager-issued sandbox/production key; no self-serve or public credentials. MCP connector is gated behind enterprise/partner PitchBook licenses.

evidence.claim: PitchBook API v2 is RESTful/JSON giving direct access to companies, deals, people, investors, funds, service providers, and LPs; sandbox key obtained via account manager; standalone contract required.
Public API V2 documentation is published on Postman.
PitchBook Premium Connector is built on MCP server technology, cloud-hosted, SSO auth, for licensed users and enterprise partner licenses; works with Claude, ChatGPT, Perplexity.
PitchBook announced an official Essential MCP integration with Perplexity for AI-powered verifiable market intelligence.

open_questions: Exact auth scheme of the Direct Data API (static API key vs OAuth token) is not confirmed from official docs (pitchbook.com blocked direct fetching). Total endpoint/operation count and whether any trial tier issues working API keys without an account manager are unclear.
